title: MobLiB
description: MobLiB is the core library for MobPvP and related mods, providing essential tools and stability. Required for MobPvP to work.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/271ff0ada6e08acb72ad15fc437dfb238018a77f.jpeg) # A KaplanBedwars Original Team: MobLiB _Compatible with Modpacks_

MobPvP

**MobLiB** is a **core library mod** required by several other mods to function properly. It does not add any gameplay features on its own, but provides the essential framework that other mods rely on. ## Features * **Required dependency for the latest versions of MobPvP.** * Provides important tools and utilities for mod developers, including: * Extra build code support for blocks and items * Mod paths and version management * Beta testing and update control * Automatic version generator * And many more internal features that make mod development and compatibility easier. ## How It Affects Players For regular players, MobLiB does not change gameplay directly. However, if you want to use MobPvP or any other mods that depend on this library, installing MobLiB is required. For modpack creators, MobLiB ensures stability, better compatibility, and easier integration of dependent mods.
